completed_tasks.name: Font comparison mockup (Sora vs Inter vs Lobster)
Rename STORY_POINTS back to FIBONACCI, cap at 13

decisions.decision: Keep Sora font for header (not Lobster)
decisions.rationale: User preferred Sora after seeing mockup comparison

decisions.decision: Rename scheme from STORY_POINTS to FIBONACCI
decisions.rationale: More honest name since values are literal Fibonacci sequence
Avoids 20 vs 21 confusion; most teams don't estimate above 13
